text.title: sota-onboarding-1day-runbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for sota-onboarding-1day-runbook application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Was the release in the last 7 days AND is the team eval-set ready?

branch.when: release_age_days <= 7 AND eval_set_ready == true AND no_active_incident == true

branch.conclusion: Skip; build the eval set first.

branch.when: release is a minor point version
branch.conclusion: Run a normal model-upgrade check instead.

example.trace: root → fresh release + eval ready → r1-8-hour-wallclock
example.description: claude-opus-4-7 announced today, team has 287-question eval set, no active incidents → run the 1-day runbook.
